testcase.name: testGetCountryException
testcase.system-out:
09:24:18.302 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests]: SpringLearnApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 09:24:18.357 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplication for test class com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests 09:24:18.418 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
